inspector.resourcegroup.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Inspector::ResourceGroup` resource is used to create Amazon Inspector resource groups. A resource group defines a set of tags that, when queried, identify the AWS resources that make up the assessment target.

inspector.resourcegroup.ResourceGroupTag.Description: The tags (key and value pairs) that will be associated with the resource group.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
